prerequisites: An active Eventzilla account with access to account settings.
An application created under Settings > App Management to generate an API key.
A generated x-api-key credential to authenticate API requests.

authMethods.name: API key (x-api-key header)
authMethods.summary: Eventzilla authenticates every request with an API key passed in the x-api-key HTTP header. Generate the key by creating a new application under Settings > App Management in your Eventzilla account, then supply it in the connector's x-api-key field. Keys can be disabled and regenerated at any time.

setupSteps.title: Generate an Eventzilla API key
setupSteps.body: Log in to your Eventzilla account and go to Settings > App Management. Create a new application to generate an API key (direct link: https://www.eventzilla.net/admin/ManageSettings?mode=appmanagement). Copy the generated key and keep it confidential.

setupSteps.title: Provide the x-api-key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated key into the connector's required x-api-key field. This value is sent in the x-api-key request header to authenticate against the Eventzilla API.

setupSteps.title: Confirm API access
setupSteps.body: The Eventzilla API is served over HTTPS only at base URL https://www.eventzillaapi.net/api/v2/. Confirm your key works against this base URL before running a sync.
